mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, work_date, check_in, check_out, status, note, created_at FROM attendance ORDER BY work_date DESC, employee_id
SELECT id, employee_id, work_date, check_in, check_out, status, note, created_at FROM attendance WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY work_date DESC
SELECT id, employee_id, work_date, check_in, check_out, status, note, created_at FROM attendance WHERE work_date = #{workDate} ORDER BY employee_id

SELECT a.id, a.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, d.name AS department_name, a.work_date, a.check_in, a.check_out, a.status, a.note, a.created_at FROM attendance a INNER JOIN employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id INNER JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, a.employee_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (employee_id, work_date, check_in, status, note) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{workDate}, #{checkIn}, #{status}, #{note})
